title: monolluma quadrangula
intro: Monolluma quadrangula, also known as 'Mullayoo', is a succulent plant species native to the Middle East and India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Monolluma quadrangula are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Monolluma quadrangula can be prepared as a herbal tea, supplement, or topical cream, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
